name: Donna Brazile
subject: re: our most fundamental right
body:
Protect our democracy.
---
**Add your name: say you're committed to protecting our democracy.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Our-Democracy1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170708_db_nd&source=em_20170708_db_nd")**
Derek, I hope you had a great Independence Day! I love the 4th of July. Whenever I can, I like to find my way to someone's cookout, grab some BBQ marinated with Cajun hot sauce, share some laughs with friends and neighbors, and catch the fireworks.

But Independence Day is also a day of reflection for me. I think about our Founding Fathers, our veterans and current service members, abolitionists and suffragists, civil rights leaders and activists, and everyone who has fought and bled and sacrificed to protect the rights and freedoms we have today.

And there's no more important right -- nothing more fundamental to our independence -- than the right to vote. It is the right we use to secure all other rights. **[Protecting the right to vote is our most important responsibility -- and, at this very moment, that right is under attack.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Our-Democracy1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Protecting+the+right+to+vote+is+our+most&utm_campaign=em_20170708_db_nd&source=em_20170708_db_nd")**

The Trump administration is hard at work -- spending our tax money to investigate completely fictitious claims of "voter fraud" (claims made by Donald Trump himself, and backed up with absolutely no evidence).

Last week, this new commission requested every single American's political party registration and voting history. There's no doubt in my mind why: they're setting the stage for a massive purge of the voter rolls, all in an attempt to disenfranchise working people, people of color, students, first-generation Americans, and seniors.

I don't have to tell you that Donald Trump has zero credibility when it comes to protecting our rights or the integrity of our elections. There's no telling how much damage this latest scheme could do to our democracy.

**We have to stand up and protect our access to the ballot box right now -- we can't risk doing nothing and hoping for the best, Derek. Add your name if you're committed to protecting our democracy:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Our-Democracy1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170708_db_nd&source=em_20170708_db_nd")**
Thanks for taking a stand,

Donna

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523262/4067b0a/375952354/7e6a0d61/1585790558/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170708_db_nd&source=em_20170708_db_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523262/4067b0a/375952354/7e6a0d6e/1585790558/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170708_db_nd&source=em_20170708_db_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523262/4067b0a/375952354/7e6a0d6f/1585790558/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170708_db_nd&source=em_20170708_db_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523262/4067b0a/375952354/7e6a0d6c/1585790558/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170708_db_nd&source=em_20170708_db_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

But Independence Day is also a day of reflection for me. I think about our Founding Fathers, our veterans and current service members, abolitionists and suffragists, civil rights leaders and activists, and everyone who has fought and bled and sacrificed to protect the rights and freedoms we have today. name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: a little league coach you should know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
I'm excited to announce my support for Kevin Cavanaugh for state Senate.
As a former state Senator and Governor, I know how crucial Kevin's voice will be to standing up for Granite Staters and fighting for equal opportunity for families, workers, and students.
[**Please join me and show your support for Kevin with a donation of $3 or more.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef7/2a380d31/19ac4d9c/fe4ad8/3174518812/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWFnZ2llNGtldmluIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzA2MjlfS0NhdkVuZG9yc2VfbmgtYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/maggie4kevin?refcode=e20170629_KCavEndorse_nh-act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Throughout his career as a union worker, Kevin has shown that he understands the importance of protecting workers' rights across the state. And as a Little League coach and father of three, he knows how critical it is that we support educational opportunities for all of our people.
When Kevin sees a problem, he dives right in, and that's exactly the kind of hands-on leadership we need in Concord.
We need to make sure Kevin Cavanaugh becomes the next state Senator from District 16, and that won't happen without your help. The election is on July 25th, so there is no time to lose. Kevin is going to be working everyday to win, let's make sure his work goes a long way.
[**Support Kevin's race in the home stretch with $3 or whatever you can give.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef7/2a380d31/19ac4d9c/fe4ad8/3174518812/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWFnZ2llNGtldmluIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzA2MjlfS0NhdkVuZG9yc2VfbmgtYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/maggie4kevin?refcode=e20170629_KCavEndorse_nh-act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Kevin has spent his whole life working for the community he loves. If we all chip in, we can elect a passionate advocate in Concord who's willing to work hard in defense of our values.
Thanks for doing your part.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef7/2a380d31/19ac4d9c/fe4ad8/3174518812/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWFnZ2llNGtldmluIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzA2MjlfS0NhdkVuZG9yc2VfbmgtYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/maggie4kevin?refcode=e20170629_KCavEndorse_nh-act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fdef7/2a380d31/19ac4d9c/fe4ad9/3174518812/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH
Senator Hassan is asking for contributions of up to $1,000 per election from individuals and $1,000 per election from multicandidate PACs. She is not asking for contributions in excess of the federal limits, or from corporations, labor organizations, and/or other federally prohibited sources.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Team Ryan
subject: President Trump is right. America is exceptional.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
**Making no apologies, President Trump replaces Obama Doctrine with American Exceptionalism --
Washington Times**

Friend --

It may have started with President Obama's apology tours, but the liberal elite have continued to make apologies for America.

Let us assure you, Friend, we have no reason to be ashamed. In fact, we have countless reasons to be proud. **America truly is exceptional.****

[Will you pledge to protect our American values today?](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=Mjk2OTU4NTQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MDk3NzM1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

If you are unashamed to be American, [**we want you with us**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=Mjk2OTU4NTQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MDk3NzM1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**.**

If you are proud of our nation, **[we want you with us](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=Mjk2OTU4NTQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MDk3NzM1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0).**

**America is exceptional. And we will not apologize for that**. [**Stand with us today > >**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=Mjk2OTU4NTQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MDk3NzM1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,
Team Ryan

| [Take a stand > >](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=Mjk2OTU4NTQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MDk3NzM1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC.

Team Ryan
320 First Street, SE
Washington, D.C. 20003
---

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Team Ryan. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Team Ryan's online community. Click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=29695854&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MDk3NzM1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe from Team Ryan.

name: announcement@dscc.org
subject: our best 2018 pickup opportunity (huge news!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We want you to know the Senate candidate we've endorsed to go after 2018's most endangered Republican Senator...
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rosen-endorsement?refcode=DPE-20170708-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
**_Public Policy Polling: virtual tie in Nevada Senate race_**
We have exciting news to share with you, team.

In the fight to replace 2018's most endangered Republican Senator, **we 're proud to announce our support behind Jacky Rosen, a tireless champion for middle class families, to take on Dean Heller.**

[**Can we count on you to join us today in helping Democrats like Jacky kick off strong campaigns?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rosen-endorsement?refcode=DPE-20170708-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rosen-endorsement?refcode=DPE-20170708-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Here's why it's so important to get involved with races early when so much is at stake:

**Nevada is Democrats ' best pickup opportunity** \-- in 2016, we protected Harry Reid's seat and elected Catherine Cortez Masto (also the first Latina to serve in the U.S. Senate). Along with that victory, Nevadans rejected Donald Trump as their President.

So as we look ahead to the 2018 seats we can take away from Republicans, this race is a chance to make Republicans pay for voting alongside Trump and Mitch McConnell.

Jacky is no doubt the tough fighter we need -- someone who will protect affordable health care for all and hold the GOP accountable for attacking Planned Parenthood. **And we already know how competitive she is: the polls are virtually TIED!**

**Our first step to defeating Mitch McConnell 's majority begins with supporting campaigns like Jacky's -- so we're asking you team: can we count on you to support Democrats and help flip this seat blue?**

[**Help us jump start Jacky Rosen 's Senate race and elect more Democrats.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rosen-endorsement?refcode=DPE-20170708-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

More than ever, we need to get organized to unseat as many Republican senators as possible.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db44/2b07114c/396ffc55/73119d9d/291987331/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db44/2b07114c/396ffc55/73119d9c/291987331/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954db44/2b07114c/396ffc55/73119d9f/291987331/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: DWS
subject: #DeleteYourAccount Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend,

Rather than using his social media presence to engage constructively with American citizens, President Trump is using Twitter as a platform to harass and cyberbully others.

It's bad enough if he were doing so as just a mean-spirited private citizen. It's another thing when he's the Commander-in-Chief.

[_**Trump 's behavior is beneath the dignity of the office of the Presidency. Add your name if you think it's time Trump delete his twitter account.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ec9/622b7b5b/45d01c0/307bc2b5/485488871/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170707")

Twitter is very clear about their rules: accounts _" may not incite or engage in the targeted abuse or harassment of others."_

As a private citizen, then as a candidate, and then as President-elect, **Trump had a long history of using his Twitter account to harass others.** His cyberbullying didn't end on Inauguration Day either.

On June 29, 2017, Trump took aim at an MSNBC host's intelligence and appearance in grotesque terms. On July 2, 2017, just a few days later, Trump posted an edited video of him wrestling and punching a CNN figure as threats against CNN employees have increased following the President's ongoing feud.

Trump is clearly violating Twitter's terms and conditions but is also doing a disservice to our country. **His harmful tweets set a horrible example for our children and incite further harassment and abuse by his supporters.** At their worst, they tarnish the image of our country abroad.

[_**It 's time to put an end to his twitter tantrums and harassment once and for all. Tell Trump it's time to delete his account.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ec9/622b7b5b/45d01c0/307bc2b5/485488871/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170707")

Thank you,

Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ec9/622b7b5b/45d01c0/307bc2b4/485488871/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---
